name: Value Pawn & Jewelry
description_short: At 2942 US Hwy 98 N in Lakeland, FL, Value Pawn & Jewelry can be reached at +1 863-802-0245.
description_long:
Value Pawn & Jewelry operates as a traditional pawn shop located at 736 NW 183rd Street in Miami, Florida. The business functions as part of the EZPAWN family of stores and serves the local community by providing quick cash solutions through collateral-based lending and merchandise sales.

The company's core services include pawn loans (where customers pledge items for cash), gold and diamond buying (with expert testing to ensure fair pricing), and retail sales of pre-owned brand-name merchandise at 25-70% discounts off retail prices. They also offer specialized services including firearms sales, auto loans, layaway programs with 10% down payments, product protection plans, and a jewelry VIP program with guaranteed loan amounts and trade-up benefits. Their Instant Quote tool allows customers to receive estimated values for electronics online before visiting the store.

Value Pawn & Jewelry differentiates itself through its EZ+ Rewards Program (which awards points on pawn, redemption, sales, and purchases), flexible payment options including third-party financing for up to 12 months, daily inventory updates with new merchandise arrivals, and specialized protections like their Jewelry VIP Program. The store maintains extended hours (9am-7pm weekdays, 9am-6pm Saturday, 12pm-5pm Sunday) and emphasizes friendly service and community commitment.

As a pawn shop, this business is best suited for consumers needing immediate cash against collateral or those seeking heavily discounted pre-owned electronics, jewelry, and merchandise. The primary caveat is that pawn loans involve surrendering personal property and are subject to fees and terms; customers should understand they may lose items if loans aren't repaid. This is a short-term liquidity solution, not a credit-building tool.
pros: Instant Quote tool provides estimated values online for electronics without store visit
Extended store hours (9am-7pm weekdays) accommodate working schedules
EZ+ Rewards Program awards points on pawns, sales, and purchases for loyalty benefits
Jewelry VIP Program offers guaranteed loan amounts, 100% trade-up values, and free cleaning/repairs
Layaway option requires only 10% down with affordable monthly payments
Third-party financing available for purchases up to 12 months depending on credit eligibility
Large inventory with daily new merchandise arrivals across jewelry, electronics, tools, and gaming
cons: Pawn loans involve losing personal property if not repaid on time, creating financial risk
Website lacks specific information about interest rates, fees, or typical loan terms
Not all services available in all areas (online payments specifically excluded in Arizona, Oregon, Pennsylvania)
All merchandise is pre-owned; no new items available despite discount marketing language
Protection plans and rewards program details are vague regarding actual cost-benefit
best_for: Consumers needing immediate cash and willing to pledge collateral
Bargain shoppers seeking 25-70% discounts on pre-owned brand-name electronics and jewelry
Individuals with gold, diamonds, or other valuables to sell for quick cash
Layaway shoppers who want to lock in prices with 10% down and monthly payments
diagnosis: Value Pawn & Jewelry is best for Miami residents needing quick cash against collateral or seeking steeply discounted pre-owned merchandise. The critical caveat is that pawn loans require surrendering personal property and involve fees—this is a short-term liquidity tool, not a sustainable financial solution, and borrowers risk losing items if unable to repay.
services: Pawn loans (collateral-based lending with cash in pocket)
Gold and diamond buying with expert testing
Retail sales of pre-owned brand-name merchandise
Third-party financing (up to 12 months on eligible purchases)
Instant Quote online tool for electronics valuation
Online shop with daily inventory updates
EZ+ Rewards Program (points on pawns, sales, purchases, redemptions)
Jewelry VIP Program (guaranteed loan amounts, trade-ups, free cleaning/repairs)
Product Protection Plans (covers computers, audio/video equipment)
